question_text:
Design Search Autocomplete System

Design autocomplete with sentences and times. Return top 3 historical sentences starting with prefix.
explanation: Use a Trie to store sentences. At each character input, traverse the Trie. At each node, store a frequency map or similar to return top 3.

test_cases.expected_output: [null,["i love you","island","i love leetcode"],["i love you","i love leetcode"],[],[]]
[["i love you","island","i love leetcode"],["i love you","i love leetcode"],[]]
